name: datagouv:search_datasets
description: Search datasets on data.gouv.fr by keywords. Usually the first step. Use short, specific queries (AND logic - generic words like 'données' return zero results). Typical workflow: search_datasets -> list_dataset_resources -> query_resource_data.

query.description: Short specific search terms, e.g. 'DVF valeurs foncieres' or 'DPE logements'

sort.description: created, last_update, reuses, followers, views. Prefix with '-' for descending, e.g. '-last_update'

last_update_range.description: Restrict to recently updated datasets: last_30_days, last_12_months, last_3_years

name: datagouv:get_dataset_info
description: Get detailed metadata about a specific dataset: title, description, organization, tags, resource count, dates, license.

name: datagouv:list_dataset_resources
description: List all resources (files) in a dataset: resource ID, title, format, size, URL. Next step: query_resource_data for CSV/XLSX, or fetch the URL directly for other formats.

name: datagouv:get_resource_info
description: Get detailed info about a specific resource (file): format, size, MIME type, URL, and whether the Tabular API (query_resource_data) is available for it.

name: datagouv:query_resource_data
description: Query tabular data (rows) from a resource via the Tabular API - works for CSV/XLSX, no download needed. Start with small page_size (20) to preview structure. Returns raw rows only; compute any stats/comparisons yourself from the results.

filter_column.description: Column name to filter on, e.g. 'code_postal'

name: datagouv:search_organizations
description: Find publishing organizations on data.gouv.fr (ministries, cities, INSEE, etc). Leave query empty to browse with pagination.

sort.description: name, datasets, reuses, followers, views, created, last_modified (prefix '-' for descending)

name: datagouv:search_dataservices
description: Search third-party APIs (dataservices) cataloged on data.gouv.fr - these provide live programmatic access, unlike static dataset files. Workflow: search_dataservices -> get_dataservice_info -> get_dataservice_openapi_spec -> call the API directly.

name: datagouv:get_dataservice_info
description: Get metadata about a third-party API (dataservice): title, description, organization, base_api_url, documentation URL, license.

name: datagouv:get_dataservice_openapi_spec
description: Fetch and summarize the OpenAPI/Swagger spec for a dataservice: available endpoints and parameters. Use before calling base_api_url.

name: datagouv:get_metrics
description: Get usage metrics (visits, downloads) for a dataset or resource, monthly, most recent first. Requires dataset_id or resource_id. Production only.

name: taxes:lookup_local_taxes
description: Get real local tax data for a commune from OFGL's REI dataset (Recensement des Éléments d'Imposition): rates, tax base, revenue collected per tax type. Covers CFE, TH, FB, FNB, TEOM-TIEOM, CVAE, IFER, GEMAPI, TSE, TVA, etc. Aggregate commune-level fiscal data, NOT a per-business simulator - no parking tax exists in this dataset. Only annee 2024/2025 currently populated.

commune.description: Commune name, e.g. 'Bordeaux' (case/accent insensitive). WARNING: names aren't unique in France (homonym communes exist in different departments) - pass 'dep' or 'idcom' to disambiguate if the result flags ambiguity.

idcom.description: INSEE commune code (5 digits), unambiguous, e.g. '33063' for Bordeaux. NOT the postal code.

dep.description: Department code (e.g. '33' for Gironde), disambiguates homonym communes

dispositif_fiscal.description: Tax type filter, e.g. CFE, TH, FB, FNB, TEOM-TIEOM, CVAE, IFER, GEMAPI-FB, TSE-TH, TVA, CHAMBRE-CFE. Omit to get all types for the commune.

categorie.description: Taux = rate, Produit = revenue collected, Base = tax base

destinataire.description: Who levies it: Commune, GFP (EPCI), Departement, Region, Divers, Etat, etc.

name: taxes:compare_taxes
description: Compare real local tax data (from OFGL REI) across multiple communes for the same tax type/category. Returns rows per commune - a commune can have several rows (different destinataire/categorie), inspect them rather than assuming one number per commune.

dep.description: Department code, disambiguates homonym communes across the whole array

dispositif_fiscal.description: e.g. 'FB' to compare property tax rates
